description: You are a robotics software engineer configuring a simulation for an autonomous industrial floor scrubber. The world file is loaded, but the robot is missing its coverage tracking visualization and its battery model is unconfigured. Configure the 'SCRUBBER_ROBOT' node by adding a 'Pen' node to its children with the name 'cleaning_trace', inkColor 0 0 1, leadSize 0.65, maxDistance 0.5, and write set to TRUE. Additionally, set the 'battery' field on the 'SCRUBBER_ROBOT' node to [8640000, 8640000, 2000]. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/factory_scrubber_configured.wbt.
